subject: Import tilt series from IMOD
body:
Hi!

I'm trying to process the 5 tilt series from Turonova et al. for training 
purposes.

When I import the tilt series aligned in IMOD, WARP produced tomostar files 
as expected, but these files do not seem to be readable by WARP for further 
processing.

I noticed that these files contain decimal points _wrpAngleTilt #2 column. 
If I manually remove the decimal points then the file is properly read.

For example, this file is ignored (I just copied the first rows as an 
example)

data_

loop_
_wrpMovieName #1
_wrpAngleTilt #2
_wrpAxisAngle #3
_wrpAxisOffsetX #4
_wrpAxisOffsetY #5
_wrpDose #6
  TS_01_038_-57.0.mrc   57.09  85.01966    35.42966   113.2249  115
  TS_01_035_-54.0.mrc   54.11  85.04208     20.4199   93.81467  106
  TS_01_034_-51.0.mrc   51.13   85.0446    30.81794   117.7421  103
....


But this file is properly read by WARP


data_

loop_
_wrpMovieName #1
_wrpAngleTilt #2
_wrpAxisAngle #3
_wrpAxisOffsetX #4
_wrpAxisOffsetY 
_wrpDose #6
  TS_01_038_-57.0.mrc   57  85.01966    35.42966   113.2249  115
  TS_01_035_-54.0.mrc   54  85.04208     20.4199   93.81467  106
  TS_01_034_-51.0.mrc   51   85.0446    30.81794   117.7421  103
...

Is this the expected behaviour?

Thanks and best regards

Genis
